CAMERA MOVES

Camera Movements

Interactive visual guide to every camera move you'll ever need.
Hover cards to see animations in action.

6 MOVES

Classic Moves

The foundational moves used in every film, TV show, and video. Master these first.

Dolly • Pan • Tilt • Zoom • Tracking • Crane
 4 MOVES

Dynamic / Cinematic

Advanced techniques that add energy, emotion, and professional polish.

Handheld • Steadicam • Whip Pan • Dutch Angle
 4 MOVES

Modern / AI-Native

Moves that are new, hard, or impossible in real filmmaking — easy in AI video.

Orbit • Drone • Dolly Zoom • Push Through
